forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 assignees:
 - claude-code
 position_column: done
-position_ordinal: ffffffffffffffffffffae80
+position_ordinal: ffffffffffffffffffffffffffcd80
 title: Add tests for lsp_communication I/O error paths and response parsing
 ---
 lsp_communication.rs

Coverage: 81.5% (229/281 lines)

Uncovered lines: 108-109, 210, 222-226, 236-239, 254-257, 269, 274-277, 280-281, 283-286, 288, 290, 326, 417-420, 469, 513, 545, 614, 625, 631, 642, 657, 731, 736, 790, 795, 801-802, 807, 817-819

Multiple areas:
1. send_request write-failure (line 210), timeout (222-226), notification-skip (236-239), wrong-ID (254-257)
2. send_notification write/flush errors (269-290)
3. wait_for_readable poll error (line 326)
4. initialize error-response handling (417-420)
5. send_did_open/close write errors (469, 513, 545)
6. collect_call_edges error branches (614, 625, 631, 642, 657)
7. uri_to_relative_path no common ancestor (731, 736)
8. read_jsonrpc_response: EOF (790), missing Content-Length (795), bad Content-Length (801-802), read_exact failure (807), JSON decode failure (817-819)

Test scenarios using mock stdin/stdout (std::io::Cursor or pipe-based):
- Write failure → LspError
- Notification before real response → skip and continue
- Response with wrong ID → warn and continue
- read_jsonrpc_response: EOF, missing header, bad integer, truncated body, invalid JSON
- uri_to_relative_path with no common ancestor → raw path

#coverage-gap #coverage-gap
\ No newline at end of file
